title: GRIMix
description: System for mixing potion effects in a new modified cauldron - the Alchemical Cauldron.
body:
# GRIMix
This mod adds a new block - the **Alchemical Cauldron**, which allows you to brew several potions together and get potions with multiple effects at once.


![Crafting an Alchemy Cauldron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/274a44d7deaaaed4e2fb96a13d23d36a97f2b083.png)


## Potion brewing system with multiple effects


### Heating
The **Alchemical cauldron** can hold up to 6 potions. If there is a heating block under the cauldron

- Fire
- Soul fire
- Campfire
- Soul сampfire
- Magma
- Lava

the cauldron will begin to heat up, with the heating speed depending on the block (**lava** is the fastest, **soul сampfire** is the slowest). As it heats up, the liquid in the **cauldron** will bubble louder and louder (the **cauldron** heats up quite quickly on lava, in about a couple of minutes). Once the **cauldron** is fully heated, you will hear a distinctive sound.


### Cooking
Once fully heated, the **cauldron** can begin cooking potions. To start the process, you need an **amethyst shard**. After adding it, particles will appear above the liquid. You will know that the process has begun by the characteristic sounds. The cooking speed also depends on the heating block (here, on the contrary, the shower fire is the fastest, and lava is the slowest; cooking on lava will take about 5 minutes, and cooking on the shower fire will take only about 50 seconds). 


### Possible failures
1. After the cooking process is complete, you will hear a loud, heavy sound, after which you need to stir the potion with a **shovel**. You have about 20 seconds to stir, during which time you will hear a sound like evaporation, which will accelerate as time passes. If you do not stir the potion, you will end up with an **_Unpredictable potion_**, the properties of which you will discover for yourself.

2. If you remove the heat after the brewing has already begun (i.e., after you have thrown the **amethyst shard** into the **cauldron**), the brewing progress will begin to decline, and if you do not restore the heat completely in time, you will also get an **_Unpredictable Potion_**.

3. You will also fail if you add **too many effects** to the **cauldron**. **The maximum number of effects in one potion is currently 4**.

In all three cases, the same sound will be played.


___



### Possible combinations of compounds and details

Since the **cauldron** has 6 slots for potions, it has the following combinations:

2 potions --->                1 mixed potion

3 potions --->                1 mixed potion

4 potions --->                2 mixed potions

5 potions --->                2 mixed potions

6 potions --->                3 mixed potions


By the same logic, in cases of failure, **_Unpredictable potions_** will be brewed. 
 

If you add the same potions, the specific effect will last longer, meaning you can pour 6 speed potions into the **cauldron** and get 3 mixed potions with a long-lasting speed effect.

It is worth noting that the effectiveness of the added time to the total duration of the effects decreases after 3 potions. This means that the time added by the fourth, fifth, and sixth potions will be less than normal.

If the effect levels are different, the result will be the level that is higher in terms of the number of potions in the **cauldron**. 

**The **Alchemical cauldron** can be obtained with a diamond pickaxe or higher.**

You can climb into the **Alchemical cauldron** (just like in vanilla). If there are any potions in the **cauldron**, you will receive the effects of those potions. A cool (in my opinion) detail.
This detail also works for the **_Unpredictable Potion_**.


There are also 3 achievements in the mod, check them out!
___
### Plans and ideas:

Currently, the mod does not allow you to pour the final potions (**_Unpredictable Potion_** and Mixed Potion) back into the **cauldron** after you have taken them out in bottles. But I will definitely fix this in future versions.

New effects for certain potion combinations.
All kinds of references.

I have tons of ideas for new effects, potions, elixirs, potion combinations, and all kinds of other changes to the vanilla potion brewing system.
I really love potions in Minecraft, so I want to add and improve a lot of things.


I hope the system isn't too complicated.
Enjoy the game!



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

I have a lot of plans and ideas for this mod, and I hope I can make them all happen.

</details>
